name: forge
description: Define your vault's structure and let Forge enforce it — lint, normalize, patch, and maintain with confidence.

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && node esbuild.config.mjs production
scripts.lint:obsidian: npm run build:core && npm exec -- eslint --no-warn-ignored "src/**/*.ts" "manifest.json" "styles.css"
scripts.version: node version-bump.mjs && git add manifest.json versions.json

author: Joshua Walls
